title: Crumbled Keto-Quesillo
description: A bitter, crumbly Argentinian dish made with keto-friendly ingredients, featuring Parmigiano-Reggiano for a salty and creamy texture.
instructions: In a bowl, mix the grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese with heavy cream until creamy.
Fold in diced bacon and halved capers into the cheese mixture.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove from oven, let it cool slightly before crumbling and serving.
